title: Per-bead journey entry v1
description: Layer 1 of the per-bead narrative substrate (flywheel-o4b4h Layer 1, dispatched as flywheel-r0rox). Captures the worker's prose narrative for the bead at close-time so that downstream layers (post-merge auto-doc, daily-report rollup, session synthesis) have a structured input. Stored at <repo>/.flywheel/journal/<bead-id>.md as the prose body with a YAML frontmatter envelope conforming to this schema.

schema_version.description: Frozen schema name + version. Workers MUST emit this literal.

bead_id.description: The bead this entry narrates (e.g., flywheel-r0rox).

task_id.description: Dispatch task id (bead-id + dispatch hash, e.g., flywheel-r0rox-6c5256).

worker_identity.description: Locked worker identity (e.g., MagentaPond) that owned this bead at close-time.

prose.description: Worker's prose narrative of what shipped, why, and what surprised. Target 50-200 words; bytes ~250-1500 (English ≈5-7 bytes/word). NOT a copy of the bead body or report.md — it is the SUBJECTIVE worker voice that downstream synthesis layers compose against.

ts.description: ISO8601 timestamp at close-time (UTC, Z-suffix, second-precision).

mission_fitness.description: Mission-fitness class echoed from the dispatch packet (must match the value in the DONE/BLOCKED callback).

commit_sha.description: Short or full git SHA of the commit that landed this bead's work. For BLOCKED dispositions, the SHA of the evidence-only commit.

linked_incidents.description: Optional. INCIDENTS.md anchor names (e.g., 'clobbered_doctrine_docs') referenced or surfaced by this bead. Used by the daily-report rollup to track incident churn.

linked_l_rules.description: Optional. L-rule numbers (e.g., 'L107', 'L70') promoted, exercised, or contested by this bead. Used by fleet-l-rule-lag probe to track promotion churn.

linked_skills.description: Optional. Skill names (e.g., 'canonical-cli-scoping', 'beads-br') consulted, authored, or amended by this bead. Used by skill-autoresearch and skill-grader.

narrative_tags.description: Optional. Free-form lowercase-kebab tags for narrative clustering (e.g., 'recovery-primitive', 'calibrate-to-upstream', 'multi-actor-experiment'). Tags should match emerging skill_discovery sd_ids where applicable.

examples.prose: Authored the journey-entry/v1 schema as Layer 1 of the per-bead narrative substrate. Schema captures bead_id, task_id, worker_identity, prose (250-1500 bytes, ~50-200 words), ts, mission_fitness, commit_sha as required; linked_incidents, linked_l_rules, linked_skills, narrative_tags as optional. Extended mission-fitness-callback-validator.sh to require journey_entry_path and refuse decision=accept when absent. Updated dispatch-template.md callback contract to name the new field. Regression test covers both pass-with and reject-without paths. Layers 2-4 (post-merge auto-doc, daily rollup, session synthesis) sequence after this foundation.
